justification: All pass criteria met: Bird's missing output explicitly detected (task status 'completed' but no deliverable received), formal escalation that stops synthesis (routed to Coach K with options, no brief produced), no handoff brief produced, escalation clearly states what is missing (domain rules, acceptance criteria, business constraints) and why it matters (Shaq would implement without verified domain constraints, risk of encoding wrong business logic), and no domain content invented.

Formal escalation routed to Coach K with concrete remediation options, not just a note
No handoff brief produced — synthesis fully blocked
Escalation articulates specific missing items: freshness thresholds, state transitions, region semantics, capacity limits
Explicitly warns that MJ's architecture cannot be verified against Bird's domain model without Bird's output

Zero invented domain rules — all examples of missing knowledge are framed as questions, not assumptions
